methodology: Marvin independent segment SOTP + Lawrence owner-cash IRR. Inputs from SEC filings and company guidance only. Third-party letters (McIntyre Q1 2026) are context tier — not blended into primary owner-cash path.
shares_source: FY2025 10-K weighted average diluted; Q1 FY2026 10-Q

balance_sheet.net_debt_note: Total debt ~$2,550M less cash $170M per FY2025 10-K; Q1 net debt similar

units.label: Labs
units.economics: Hospital/central lab instruments + consumables; multi-year contracts; ~95% recurring per company disclosures

units.label: Immunohematology (Transfusion Medicine)
units.economics: Blood bank / transfusion testing; Ortho heritage; stable installed base

units.label: Point of Care
units.economics: Respiratory rapid tests (Sofia, Triage); flu seasonality; post-COVID normalization

units.label: Molecular Diagnostics
units.economics: Savanna / LEX platform launch; company guided ~$50M launch drag in 2026

segment_ebitda_model.note: [Assumption] Segment EBITDA allocated from consolidated $597M using revenue share and margin differentials inferred from business mix — not from external letters

units.margin_rationale: Highest recurring mix; margin expansion from cost program
LEX launch investment; company guided drag

catalyst_poc_divestiture.headline: QuidelOrtho exploring sale of point-of-care testing unit for ~$1.5B
catalyst_poc_divestiture.source: Financial Times via Seeking Alpha / GuruFocus — not company confirmed
catalyst_poc_divestiture.rationale: Reduce ~$3.8B merger debt; POC FY25 revenue $601.6M down 13% YoY
catalyst_poc_divestiture.note: Modeled as scenario overlay in valuation_model.html; not in Lawrence base IRR until SEC filing

owner_cash_bridge.note: Marvin primary path — derived from filings, not McIntyre normalization
owner_cash_bridge.fcf_conversion_rationale: Company targets 25% of EBITDA; FY25 actual ~17% due to A/R timing — haircut for LEX and China
owner_cash_bridge.stress_note: 25% haircut on owner cash if revenue decline persists through FY26

peer_multiples_reference.note: Context only — Marvin base uses discounted multiples vs peers given leverage and turnaround
peer_multiples_reference.implied_calc: Market cap ~$935M + net debt ~$2,380M = EV ~$3,315M / $597M EBITDA

external_context.label: McIntyre Partnerships Q1 2026
external_context.use: Cross-check context only — not primary IRR inputs
external_context.claims_summary: Five unrelated issues; core 75% healthier; ~$4 FCF/sh by 2028; strategic levers include POC/IH sale
